zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Barbara Mehbreys於1584年11月14日出生在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 卡爾茲盧斯圖史額可時，她的父親Daniel Mehbreys25歲，母親Mrs. Daniel Mehbreys20歲。她和Johann Christof Wolf至少有1個女兒。她去世於1617年2月4日在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特享年32歲。

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

nameMeanings.name: Barbara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

variants.name: Barbra
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Barbara Mehbreys was born on 14 November 1584, in Spöck, Stutensee, Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, her father, Daniel Mehbreys, was 25 and her mother, Mrs. Daniel Mehbreys, was 20. She had at least 1 daughter with Johann Christof Wolf. She died on 4 February 1617, in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Barbara Mehbreys est née le 14 novembre 1584, à Spöck, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Daniel Mehbreys, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Daniel Mehbreys, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Johann Christof Wolf. Elle est décédée le 4 février 1617, à Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Barbara Mehbreys am 14. November 1584 in Spöck, Stutensee, Landkreis Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Daniel Mehbreys 25 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Daniel Mehbreys 20. Sie hatte mit Johann Christof Wolf mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 4. Februar 1617 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Barbara Mehbreys родилась 14 ноября 1584 г. в местности спoкк, стутенси, ландкрис карлсрух, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия, её отцу по имени Daniel Mehbreys было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Daniel Mehbreys, 20. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Johann Christof Wolf. Она умерла 4 февраля 1617 г. в местности стаффорт, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден в возрасте 32 лет.
